# Media tag → CMS wiring — dry-run plan (2026-06-20)

**What this is.** A no-write match report mapping every Finder-tagged image in
`~/zhic-media` to its destination field in the Payload CMS (box `80.240.31.146:3001`),
ahead of a **full re-sync from tags** (tagged library = source of truth) with
**ProductVariant image wiring**. Generated by
`services/api/scripts/match-media-tags.py`; per-file detail in
`media-tag-wiring-dryrun-2026-06-20.csv` (639 rows).

This report is the review gate. Nothing has been written to the box.

---

## 1. Headline numbers

639 non-duplicate media files (899 total − 260 in `zhic-duplicates/`).

| Bucket | Files | Meaning |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| **Auto-resolved cleanly** | **526** | matched (514) + by-name (6) + fallback (4) + design-detail (2) |
| Design scenes → `design.gallery` | 68 | curation: one per occupancy may be promoted to `occupancyMedia`/`sliderMedia` |
| `review` (under-tagged / collection / home) | 11 | see §6 |
| Journal covers — manual topic match | 9 | box article slugs differ; see §7 |
| **UNMATCHED — catalog gaps** | **7** | media for products not in the catalog; **operator decision** (§5) |
| Showroom city ambiguous | 1 | `showroom-hamedan` → 2 showrooms (§4) |
| Untagged loose renders (`unnamed/`) | 17 | homeless; drop or assign (§8) |

Target-field distribution of the resolved set:

| Field | Files |
| --- | ---: |
| `product-variant.image` (cross-fade) | 194 → 110 distinct variant SKUs |
| `product.gallery` (plain `product`) | 118 |
| `product.gallery` (styled `picture`) | 87 |
| `design.gallery` (scene) | 68 |
| `product.gallery[0]` (`main`, primary) | 59 |
| `showroom.cover` | 16 |
| `design.gallery` (detail) | 15 |
| `design.sliderMedia` (base card / poster) | 13 + 8 |
| `article.heroImage` | 9 |
| `design.logoMedia` (namemark) | 7 |
| `design.occupancyMedia[*].image` (posters) | 10 |
| `home.rooms[].image` | 3 |

---

## 1b. Catalog vs. spec — `Zhicwood URL list.xlsx` is the source of truth

The xlsx is the authoritative list of what *should* exist. Comparison:

| | Count |
| --- | ---: |
| Spec product slugs (xlsx, distinct) | **278** |
| Box catalog products | 271 |
| **Shared** | **271** |
| On box but NOT in spec | **0** (clean subset — nothing to remove) |
| In spec but NOT on box (as a product) | **7** |

**The box is a faithful, clean subset of the spec.** The 7 "missing" products are
*not* data gaps — 6 are modeling differences and 1 is genuinely unmodeled:

| Spec slug | Spec attr | Box reality | Verdict |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `caroline-vanity-6d` | drawers=6 | `caroline-vanity` **variant drawers=6** ✓ | modeled as variant |
| `sento-file-6d` | drawers=6 | `sento-file` variant drawers=6 ✓ | modeled as variant |
| `gandom-file-6d` | drawers=6 | `gandom-file` variant drawers=6 ✓ | modeled as variant |
| `roco-vanity-5d` | drawers=5 | `roco-vanity` variant drawers=5 ✓ | modeled as variant |
| `catherine-console-1d` | drawers=1 | `catherine-console` variant drawers=1 ✓ | modeled as variant |
| `skate-bookcase-drawer` | drawers=1 | `skate-bookcase` variant drawers=1 ✓ | modeled as variant |
| `iron-standing-mirror-regal` | — (distinct) | `iron-standing-mirror` has 2 **blank-axis** variants | ⚠️ genuinely unmodeled |

So the only **spec-vs-box choice** is: do the 6 N-drawer items get their own product
URL (spec) or stay variant-picker options of the base (box)? The box model already
works with the storefront filter/PickerBar, and the drawer media already wires to the
right variant image (`caroline-vanity-6-drawers.webp → caroline-vanity-drawers-6`).

**`iron-standing-mirror-regal`** is the one real item: the spec wants a distinct
"regal" mirror; the box has `iron-standing-mirror` with two indistinguishable
(blank-axis) variants, and the `*-regal*` media currently routes to the base mirror's
gallery. Needs: a `style=regal` axis, a separate product, or accept gallery.

**Crucially, this confirms the 7 orphan media in §5** — `lotus-console-vanity-mirror`,
`skate-console`, `gandom-bookcase`, `lorena-vanity` are **not in the spec either**, so
they are not products that should exist. Orphan/drop is the correct call.

---

## 2. How the tags decode (the wiring key)

Each image carries a structured Finder-tag record across five axes:

| Axis | Values | Drives |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Role** | `product` `main` `picture` `detail` `scene` `poster` `namemark` `collection` `showroom-card` `journal` `room` | *which field* |
| **Occupancy** | `teen` `double` `baby` `bunk` `all-occupencies` | `occupancies` / which poster slot |
| **Category** | `wardrobe` `vanity` `single-bed` `bed` `nightstand` `bookcase` `standing-mirror` `vanity-mirror` `console` `file` … | *which product* |
| **Variant axis** | `1door/2doors/3doors`, `1–6drawers`, sizes `90–180`, `mdf/glass`, `footboard-high/low` | *which variant* |
| **Color** | `cream` `green` `blue-gray` | `finish` axis (`blue-gray`→`gray`) |

**The convergence that makes this deterministic:** filename = product slug = tags,
all in the `{design}-{type}-{axes}` convention. `iron-bookcase-picture.webp`
(tags `bookcase, teen, product, picture`, folder `iron/`) → product
`/products/iron-bookcase`, role `picture` → `gallery`. Design = folder name;
piece = category tag → product-type; variant axes → the variant's `axes`.

### Role → destination

| Role | Destination |
| --- | --- |
| `main` + `product` | `Products.gallery[0]` (primary) |
| `product` / `picture` / `detail` | `Products.gallery[…]` |
| variant axis tags present | `ProductVariants.image` (matched by `axes`) |
| `scene` | `Designs.gallery` (curate hero → `occupancyMedia`/`sliderMedia`) |
| `poster` (`bedroom-set/`, per occ) | `Designs.sliderMedia` + `Designs.occupancyMedia[occ].image` |
| `namemark` (`bedroom-set/`) | `Designs.logoMedia` |
| `collection` | `Collections.*` |
| `showroom-card` (`showrooms/`) | `Showrooms.cover` |
| `journal` (`journal/`) | `Articles.heroImage` |
| `room` / `homepage` | `Home` global rooms |

---

## 3. What fits cleanly (no decision needed)

- **Product galleries** — 264 `main`/`picture`/`detail`/`product` shots resolve to
  an existing product slug. `main`→`gallery[0]`, the rest appended.
- **Variant images** — 194 axis-tagged shots resolve to 110 existing variant SKUs
  via `axes` match. The box has 102/228 variants with **no** image today → this
  fills them (`finish` axis already exists with `cream`/`green`/`gray`, so colorways
  wire without a schema change).
- **Design hub media** (`bedroom-set/`) maps 1:1 to fields `seed-bedroom-set.mts`
  already uses: **7 namemarks → `logoMedia`**, **21 base cards/posters → `sliderMedia`**,
  **10 per-age posters → `occupancyMedia[baby|teen|double|bunk].image`**.
- **Showrooms** — 14 city covers match directly + `showroom-babol → babol-amirkala`.
- **Home rooms** — 3 room posters → `Home.rooms[].image`.

---

## 4. Showroom — one to confirm

`showroom-hamedan.webp` maps to **two** showrooms on the box
(`hamedan-maryanaj`, `hamedan-taleghani`). Decision: which gets the cover, or both?
All others auto-resolve.

---

## 5. UNMATCHED — 7 files = orphan renders (not in spec, not on box)

Confirmed against the xlsx spec (§1b): these renders' products are **not in the
spec**, so they shouldn't exist as catalog entries. **Recommend: orphan/drop** from
the re-sync (keep the files; don't wire). Flag to the catalog owner only if a render
implies a product the spec missed.

| File(s) | Design | Tagged piece | Catalog reality |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `lotus-console-vanity-mirror.webp` (+`-mid`) | lotus | vanity-mirror | lotus has `wall-mirror` + `standing-mirror`, **no console-vanity-mirror** |
| `skate-console.webp` (+`-v2`) | skate | console | skate has **no console** product |
| `gandom-bookcase.webp` | gandom | bookcase | gandom is baby-only (`baby-bed`/`wardrobe`/`file`/`display-cabinet`/`wall-shelf`), **no bookcase** |
| `lorena-vanity-3-drawers.webp` (`-v2`/`-v3`) | lorena | vanity | lorena has `vanity-chair` + `console`, **no vanity** product |

---

## 6. `review` — 11 files

- **3 collection heroes** — `caroline-collection.webp`, `lotus-collection.webp`,
  `loof-collection-green.webp` → `Collections`. Box has **1** collection only;
  decide target collection(s) or create them.
- **3 home room posters** — `homepage-baby-room-poster`, `teen-room-poster-homepage`,
  `homepage-double-room-poster` → `Home.rooms[].image` (the last two sit in
  `unnamed/` but are clearly home posters).
- **5 under-tagged `verna/` files** — `verna-single-bed-120-picture` (×3),
  `verna-nightstand`, `verna-study-desk-light-picture` have a **category but no
  role tag** (`product`/`picture` missing). Filename says product; safe to route by
  filename, but flagged because the tag record is incomplete. **Fix: add the role
  tag** (or accept filename routing).

---

## 7. Journal — 9 covers, manual match ⚠️

The 9 `journal/*.webp` use real editorial topics
(`journal-tahkhab-baray-do-nasl`, `journal-cheraa-choob-gerdoo-irani`,
`journal-wood-care-guide`, …) but the box's 20 articles are **filler-seed** with
unrelated slugs (`ravayat-kargah-hafte-baa-ostadkaar`, `otaagh-nojavaan-…`). No
slug overlap → **no auto-match**. These covers belong to real articles that either
(a) replace the filler, or (b) need a manual topic→article mapping. Out of scope for
the automated re-sync; handle as an editorial pass.

---

## 8. Loose / untagged — 17 files (`unnamed/`)

`PA TAKHTY*` / `pa takhty-2…13` (nightstand renders), `panel.webp`, `pagboard.webp`,
`PANNEL USB.webp`. No tags, no clear product home. **Drop, or tag + assign** to a
nightstand/desk-accessory product. (`homepage-double-room-poster` /
`teen-room-poster-homepage` here are actually home posters — see §6.)

---

## 9. Operational notes for the re-sync

- **Runs on the box.** DB + uploaded media live on `80.240.31.146`. The importer
  (`seed-from-tags.mts`, modeled on `seed-bedroom-set.mts`) must run there with
  `~/zhic-media` synced to the box, OR drive the REST API from local. The tag read
  (`xattr com.apple.metadata:_kMDItemUserTags`) is **macOS-only** — extract the tag
  map to JSON locally first, ship the JSON + files to the box.
- **Full re-sync semantics** (operator choice): rebuild each product `gallery` and
  design media from tags, replacing current attachments. The June-8 audit's alt text
  / ordering will be regenerated — the importer must re-derive Persian alt text per
  image (reuse `reconcile-10` logic) so accessibility isn't lost.
- **Idempotent**, keyed by destination filename (reupload-by-name), like the existing
  seeds.
- **`all-occupencies` → empty `occupancies`** (`[]` = no age filter), per the schema
  field doc. Note the literal typo in the tag vocabulary.
- **Variant `finish`** already supports `cream`/`green`/`gray`; map `blue-gray`→`gray`.
  `mdf`/`glass` → `door_material` axis.

---

## 10. Decisions

### Locked (2026-06-20)

1. **`iron-standing-mirror-regal` → CREATE as a separate product** (per spec:
   series=iron, type=standing-mirror, distinct from `iron-standing-mirror`). Its 2
   media files (`iron-standing-mirror-regal.webp` → `gallery[0]`,
   `-picture.webp` → `gallery`) wire to the new product, not the base mirror.
2. **N-drawer slugs (`-6d`/`-5d`/`-1d`/`-drawer`) → KEEP box variant model.** No new
   product pages; their media stays as variant images (already wired). The spec's
   separate `-Nd` URLs are not created.

### Still open (smaller — proceeding on the recommended default unless changed)

3. **§5 orphan media (7)** → **drop** from the re-sync (keep files, don't wire).
4. **§4 hamedan** → cover goes to **both** `hamedan-maryanaj` + `hamedan-taleghani`.
5. **§6 collections (3)** → **defer** with the editorial pass.
6. **§6 verna under-tagging (5)** → **accept filename routing** (route by slug).
7. **§7 journal (9)** → **defer** to an editorial pass.
8. **§8 loose (17)** → **drop** from the re-sync.

Everything else (526 clean + 68 scenes + showrooms + hub media + the new
`iron-standing-mirror-regal` product) is ready to wire.
